about_no_telemetry: No telemetry, no analytics, no calls home. The only outbound request the app initiates without you is the GitHub release check — and that can be disabled in Settings.
about_no_telemetry_body: No telemetry, no analytics, no phoning home. The only outbound request is the GitHub release check — and it's optional.
addon_auto_trackers: Automatically add public trackers to new torrents
addon_intro: Extend BATorrent with community add-ons for catalogs, streams and search.
addon_search_enable_hint: Lets the search window use the configured API
addt_wontfit: This torrent needs %1, more than the free space on the save disk.
adv_ignore_lan: Exempt LAN peers from speed limits
set_engine_split: Run engine in a separate process
set_engine_split_note: Isolates the torrent engine in a child process, so an engine crash can't close the window — it restarts automatically. Requires an app restart to take effect. Experimental: some extras (auto cover on add, a few notifications, the WebUI) are limited in this mode. Test on your platform before relying on it.
adv_rate_overhead: Include IP overhead in rate limits
create_private_hint: Disables DHT, PEX and LSD — for private trackers
create_no_files: No files found at the source.
create_write_failed: Could not write the output file.
create_start_seed_hint: Adds the torrent and starts seeding
defender_exclude_fail: Failed to add exclusion. Make sure to accept the UAC prompt.
defender_exclude_ok: Folder added to Windows Defender exclusions: %1
diag_at_local_limit: Hitting your per-torrent download cap of %1 KB/s. Raise it in the context menu → Download limit.
diag_choked: Peers are connected but choking us. Often resolves itself within minutes as the swarm rotates unchoke slots.
diag_completed: Marked as Completed — no traffic by design. Resume to seed again.
diag_no_peers: No peers connected. Try Force re-announce; check trackers list; verify your listen port isn't firewalled.
diag_no_seeds: Connected to peers but no seeders — only leechers can swap partial data. Wait for a seeder to come online.
diag_paused: This torrent is paused. Click Resume to start it.
diag_seeding_no_uploaders: Seeding, but no peers are downloading from you right now. Try Force re-announce.
discover_no_keys: Add a TMDB or IGDB API key in Settings to use Discover.
empty_body: Drop a .torrent file anywhere on this window, paste a magnet link, or use the toolbar.
empty_body2: Add a .torrent file, paste a magnet link or search — your downloads show up here.
empty_drag_hint: or drag files onto this window
error_disk_full: Disk full — all downloads paused. Free up space and resume manually.
full_restore_bad_format: That doesn't look like a BATorrent backup.
game_sources_empty: No catalogs yet. Add a source URL above.
game_sources_hint: Add a community game catalog (a JSON URL). BATorrent fetches it and searches it locally — nothing is bundled with the app.
import_restart: Please restart BATorrent for changes to take effect.
killswitch_triggered: VPN interface went down — all torrents paused.
magnet_meta_hint: Metadata (name and file list) will be downloaded from the network after adding.
magnet_multi_hint: Accepts multiple links, one per line
src_footer_note: Localized sources may route your query through a third-party or a service you self-host.
src_hint: Turn sources on or off, or add localized ones for your region.
state_fetching_metadata: Looking for a peer with this torrent's file list (%1m) — rare torrents can take a while
wrapped_empty: Not enough history yet — your recap fills in as you use BATorrent through the year.
pairing_no_iface: No active network interface found. Connect to Wi-Fi or wired network.
pairing_setup_hint: Turn on pairing to control BATorrent from your phone on the same Wi-Fi. A password is generated for you.
pairing_login_hint: Scan the QR or open the URL on your phone, then sign in with these credentials.
player_error: This file's format isn't supported by the built-in player.
remove_also_files: Also delete the files from disk
remove_confirm_body: You are about to remove %1 from the list. This action cannot be undone.
remove_delete_note: Moves the downloaded data to the system trash
remove_trashed: Moved to Trash — empty it to reclaim space
remove_permanent_note: Skip the Trash and free the space now
removed_history_desc: Last 50 torrents you removed. Re-add to restart with the same save path; the actual files on disk are untouched (you used Remove, not Remove with files).
removed_history_desc2: Restore a torrent removed by mistake. The history keeps the last 50.
rss_no_rule: No auto-download rule on this feed
search_prompt_sub: Movies, series and games across your sources.
search_empty_hint: Try different terms, or check your sources in Catalogs.
rss_empty_sub: Follow a feed and new releases can download automatically.
state_no_peers_dht: No peers yet — searching the swarm via DHT and trackers
state_no_peers: No peers — waiting for tracker responses
state_no_seeds: Peers connected, but no seeds — the missing pieces aren't available
state_choked: Peers connected, but none are uploading to us right now
state_missing_pieces: Downloading, but some pieces have no seeder anywhere — it may stall before finishing
palette_placeholder: Type a command or torrent name…
search_wontfit_body: %1 needs %2, but only %3 is free on the save disk. Add anyway? It'll auto-pause if the disk runs critically low.
search_no_games: No games found in the catalogs.
hub_watch_placeholder: Start a movie and it'll show up here.
hub_play_placeholder: Play a game and it'll show up here.
hub_empty_sub: Download a game or movie to start your collection
hub_install_need_exe: Couldn't find the game — pick it manually
set_anon_note: Hides client name/version in handshakes and disables UPnP/NAT-PMP announcements.
set_api_url_ph: URL of a compatible search API
set_auto_complete_note: After this continuous seeding time, marks the torrent as Completed (green, paused).
extract_password_label: Archive password (leave empty if there isn't one)
set_extract_passwords_note: Tried automatically (newest first) when extracting. Separate with ; — also used by right-click → Extract.
set_auto_extract_note: On completion, unpacks RAR/ZIP/7z (incl. multi-part) using your saved passwords. Needs 7-Zip/WinRAR (Windows) or unrar/unzip (macOS/Linux). You can also right-click any torrent → Extract.
set_game_autoinstall_note: When a game finishes downloading, extract and set it up automatically — ready to play in one step.
set_auto_trackers2: Add public trackers automatically to new torrents
set_auto_trackers_note: Automatically add a maintained public tracker list to new torrents.
set_autoresume_note: Resumes only the torrents the kill switch paused — not the ones you paused manually.
set_blocklist_note: Loaded IP ranges are dropped before the handshake.
set_dht_note: Discovers peers without a tracker. Disable on private trackers (BEP-27).
set_discord_note: Discord Rich Presence — shows your download/seed status. Requires the Discord app running.
set_encryption_note: Forced = encrypted only. Many ISPs throttle plaintext BitTorrent.
gw_searching: Looking for the best release of %1…
gw_buffering: Downloading %1 — the player opens automatically once it buffers
set_pref_quality_note: Used by Get & Watch to auto-pick a release (falls back to nearby qualities if the exact one isn't available).
set_autoplay_next_note: When a series episode ends, automatically play the next one.
set_prefer_native_note: For Get & Watch and search, put releases in your language first — even over higher quality — and ask stream sources (Torrentio) for your-language and dubbed releases. Off = best quality regardless of language.
set_sub_bg_note: Opacity of a box behind subtitles (0 = none, just an outline).
set_proxy_leakproof_note: Route trackers + DNS through the proxy and block the leaks (UPnP/NAT-PMP/LSD) that would expose your real IP.
set_proxy_presets_note: Fill the SOCKS5 fields for a known tunnel. Mullvad's local SOCKS5 works only while connected to Mullvad.
set_proxy_preset_applied: Proxy filled in — turn it on with the Proxy type above.
set_proxy_leaktest_note: Check which external IP peers see through the proxy.
set_proxy_leaktest_ok: Peers see this IP through your tunnel: %1
set_killswitch_note: Pauses every active torrent the instant the bound interface goes down.
set_listen_port_note: Peer connections come in here. Match it with your router's port-forward rule.
set_media_jellyfin: Notify Jellyfin / Emby on download complete
set_pair_note: Shows a copyable LAN URL for opening the WebUI on your phone.
set_proxy_type_note: Routes all peer + tracker traffic through a SOCKS5 or HTTP proxy.
set_pt_note: Turns off DHT/PEX/LSD, forces anonymous handshake and announces to all tiers.
set_scheduler_note: Switches to the alternate limits during a configured time window and days.
set_seed_ratio_note: Pauses seeding when upload ÷ download reaches this ratio. 0 = no limit.
set_sub_addons: Automatic trackers, torrent search, media servers and extraction.
set_sub_advanced: Fine-tune disk I/O, connections, choke algorithms and metadata APIs.
set_sub_general: Download folders, language, appearance and system-tray behavior.
set_sub_network: Listen port, peer discovery, encryption and protocol privacy.
set_sub_notif: Get alerts via Telegram, show activity on Discord and enable sounds.
set_sub_proxy: Route peers and trackers through a proxy and drop IP ranges via blocklist.
set_sub_speed: Global and alternate limits, seeding rules and time scheduling.
set_sub_vpn: Bind traffic to an interface and protect against leaks outside the VPN.
set_sub_webui: Control BATorrent from the browser and pair your phone on the same network.
set_telegram_token_note: Create a bot via @BotFather on Telegram and paste the HTTP API token here.
set_temp_path_note: Incomplete downloads go here first, then move to the destination when they finish.
set_temp_path_ph: Download to this folder first, move when done
set_tmdb_note: Free key from themoviedb.org — movie/series posters.
set_use_tor_note: Route all traffic through Tor (SOCKS5 127.0.0.1:9050). Tor must be running.
set_verbose_note: Captures extra detail on libtorrent events. Use when reporting a bug; turn off afterwards.
set_post_download_action_note: Runs the chosen action once every active download finishes (60s cancelable countdown).
settings_close_to_tray: Close to tray instead of quitting
settings_default_failed: Could not set default. Try running as administrator.
settings_default_success: BATorrent is now the default torrent application.
settings_defender_exclude: Add download folder to Windows Defender exclusions
set_prefer_tcp_note: Stops µTP from throttling your TCP peers — faster on a dedicated line, but can add latency (bufferbloat) on a shared one. Takes effect on restart.
settings_kill_switch: Pause torrents if interface drops (Kill Switch)
settings_random_port: Use a random port on each launch
settings_set_default: Set BATorrent as default torrent app
settings_show_splash: Intro animation on first run and updates
set_layout_classic_note: Keep the vertical rail on the left instead of the top navigation bar
settings_telegram_test_missing: Fill in token + chat ID first.
settings_use_default_path: Always use default save path (skip folder dialog)
settings_webui_warning_msg: Enabling remote access exposes the WebUI to your network. Use a VPN or reverse proxy with HTTPS for secure remote access.
stream_no_player: No video player found. Install VLC or IINA to stream.
stream_no_video: No video file found in this torrent.
tip_defender_exclude: Adds your download folder to Windows Defender exclusion list so it stops flagging downloaded files. Requires administrator permission (UAC prompt).
update_available: BATorrent %1 is available. Download and install now?
update_uptodate: You're already on the latest version.
warn_low_disk: Low disk space — only %1 MB remaining. Downloads may fail if disk fills up.
warn_disk_autopause: Low disk — paused %1 download(s), %2 MB left
warn_torrent_faulted: Paused %1 — it kept hitting errors. Check the file or disk, then resume it.
warn_mem_guard: Paused all torrents — memory use hit %1 MB (limit %2 MB). This may be a bug; please report it.
warn_suspicious_body: %1 contains a file that looks unsafe: %2. Don't run it unless you trust the source.
set_warn_suspicious_note: Shows a warning when a downloaded media torrent hides an executable (e.g. movie.mp4.exe). Local check only — no files are uploaded, and nothing is ever deleted.
set_auto_defender_note: Adds each new download's folder to Windows Defender's exclusions (one UAC prompt). Useful for false positives on cracked games, but it also stops Defender scanning those folders — leave off unless you know you need it.
defender_excluded_fail: Couldn't exclude the folder (cancelled or unavailable)
set_mem_guard_hint: Pause everything if the app's RAM exceeds this, as a safety valve against a runaway bug. 0 turns it off.
welcome_blurb2: BATorrent is a lightweight, open-source BitTorrent client. Functional, dark, focused.
tour_s1_d: Your sidebar — switch between Downloads, Discover, Search and the HUB from here.
tour_s1_d_top: Your navigation bar — switch between Downloads, Discover, Search and the HUB from here.
tour_s2_d: Open a .torrent file, or use Magnet to paste a link. Your downloads appear in the list below.
tour_s3_d: Browse trending movies, shows and games — picked for your region. Click a poster to find it.
tour_s4_d: Find anything by title. We match the movie, show or game first, then list the best releases.
tour_s5_d: Your library — resume what you were watching or playing, right where you left off.
tour_s6_d: Tweak themes, the app icon, network and everything else here. Enjoy BATorrent!
whatsnew_4_note: Thank you — over 2,000 of you have downloaded BATorrent. 4.0 is the biggest update yet: a whole new Hub to discover, search and watch. I build this in my spare time; your support means everything. — Mateus
whatsnew_4_h1: New Discover, Search and HUB — find and play movies, shows and games.
whatsnew_4_h2: Pick your own app icon, plus a refreshed, more polished interface.
whatsnew_4_h3: Faster, more reliable downloads with dozens of fixes.
whatsnew_generic_note: Thanks for updating BATorrent. Here's what changed in this version.
set_app_icon_note: Changes the Dock / taskbar icon — independent of your theme. The file-manager icon (.app / .exe) stays the same.
tour_s0_d: Let me show you around — it takes about 30 seconds.
welcome_tour_hint: We'll show you around with a quick guided tour.
tray_still_running: BATorrent is still running in the tray.
add_url_failed: Couldn't download the .torrent from that URL
set_follow_system_note: Automatically switch light/dark with the operating system.
set_preallocate_note: Reserve the full file size up front instead of growing files as data arrives. Reduces fragmentation.
set_auto_recheck_note: Force a hash check when a torrent is added, so existing or partial files on disk are detected.
crash_toast_body: If it crashed, you can report it — a log snippet is attached for review.
subsearch_empty: No subtitles found. Try another result, or load a file manually.
subsearch_no_sources: For movies, add a free OpenSubtitles API key in Settings → Advanced (series work without it via Gestdown).
set_subdl_key_note: Free key from subdl.com — the primary subtitle source for movies and series in the player. Built in by default; override here to use your own account.
set_os_key_note: Optional fallback. Paste your own opensubtitles.com account to unlock its 20/day (free) or 1000/day (VIP) quota.
set_debrid_note: Pick a debrid service and paste its API key. Magnets are sent to your account, cached on the service's servers, and streamed straight to the player — no local download, no seeding. Real-Debrid: real-debrid.com/apitoken · TorBox: torbox.app/settings.
star_ask_body: A GitHub star helps more people find it — one click, big difference.
